title: schefflera reticulata
intro: Schefflera reticulata, also known as the umbrella plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. The medicinal properties of Schefflera reticulata include its potential in treating fever, headache, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of consuming Schefflera reticulata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Schefflera reticulata involve making infusions from the leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
